title: The Children Are Still in Danger
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9. The central beat is the children are still in danger.
scene: The scene focuses on the children are still in danger, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9 shaping the Punk Hazard conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No!! lady, where are you...? Help me....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Stop that!! Get away from the door!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ahhhh.... Sanji... you came to save me....

dialogue.speaker: Vergo
dialogue.text: Sorry to keep you waiting, Vergo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: How strange. Where did my cookies go?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I NEVER GAVE YOU ANY COOKIES!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Very soon... MORE'! Prepare the transmission!

summary: The Children Are Still in Danger. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
